title: gladiolus pavonia
intro: Gladiolus pavonia, also known as the red sword lily or red gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, known for its vibrant red or pink flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Gladiolus pavonia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin problems and respiratory issues.
